LC3s-false-claim-not-entailed-by-injecte.rule: false claims must not be a substring of the target's STORE gloss and must have token-Jaccard < 0.5 vs it

LC8p-prompt-surface-disjoint.rule: no item shares its exact prompt surface (question + option texts, unsalted sha256) with any of the 650 d-qa, 1000 d-qa-r, or 360 d-qa-t items, with an earlier item of this corpus, or with the sibling store corpus

RULING-G2-claim-polarity-substitutions.rule: plain-padded holds EXACTLY ONE unique admissible segment per concept (measured), so the second claim-true skeleton of a concept substitutes to claim-false (seeded donor), identically in both store corpora; answer flips yes->no vs the kernel skeleton on exactly these items (disclosed deviation; plain/opaque skeleton identity is preserved)

RULING-G2-donor-redraws.rule: claim-false items whose committed donor has no admissible segment on the PLAIN store redraw the donor (seeded); the redrawn donor binds BOTH stores

note: fail-closed: any violation aborts the build; this file exists only on PASS. G-TOK (exact SmolLM2-135M token band vs the kernel d-qa-t surfaces) is the separate pinned gate poc/gsx0/gtok_check.py -> poc/gsx0/g3-token-band-gsx0.json.
